title: Some novelty tools added to the site.

body.text: This update adds a couple of tools that act as a bit of a novelty.

texts: Added the Keyword Solver: Set how many sinners to deploy and how many identities (minimum) you want for each status and the solver will find teams that meet those requirements. Has other settings for fixing, blacklisting, or whitelisting identities.
Added the Team Randomizer: Have the site randomize a team for you. Has settings for fixing, blacklisting, or whitelisting identities and E.G.Os.
Added the Floor Planner: A quick way to view what theme packs you can choose and exclusive gifts you can get from those packs. Sharing full floor plans still falls under MD Plans.
Added a toggle to MD Plans to hide descriptions of floors to allow viewing them in a more compact manner.
Fixed an issue where the search bar in the big identities/E.G.Os selector wasn't working.
Unique Ammo identities now properly appear when searching for the Ammo status in the identities page.
Sorted the sin affinities with advantages on the choice events page for consistency.
